T0272.title: Traffic Front End
T0272.definition: 前端指引流链条中用于吸引用户首次点击或访问的入口页面或内容。
T0272.description: This includes fake short videos, deceptive ad landing pages, or phishing links, serving as the first point of contact between fraudsters and their victims. The frontend is designed to be highly enticing, with the goal of maximizing click-through traffic and seamlessly funnelling users into the subsequent stages of the scam or information harvesting process.
